svg.text: MOZA MTQ Throttle Panel - Button Reference
js2 throttle, buttons 1-65 + axes · buttons 44-48 are absent on the device
KEYPAD / ENCODERS / MODE KNOB / ROCKER / TOGGLES

Throttle forward = axis (RY); reverse = rear-detent button 34. The FLAPS & Speedbrake levers drive analog axes (Slider / Dial) in Mining / Salvage modes - their click detents (31-43) are left unbound.
